vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: Bootstrap Python package skeleton for qr23mf

plan.title: Bootstrap Python skeleton (pyproject.toml, uv, Taskfile, CI)

narratives.Overview: Stand up the project skeleton so all downstream scopes have a working test/build/lint loop.
narratives.Acceptance: A newly cloned repo can run `uv sync` then `task check` and all stages (fmt, lint, typecheck, test) pass on an empty stub package. `uv tool install .` produces a `qr23mf` console script that prints `--help` output.
narratives.Scope: Create pyproject.toml (Hatchling backend, Python ≥3.11), declare runtime deps (segno, numpy-stl, typer), declare dev deps (pytest, pytest-cov, ruff, mypy), add `[project.scripts] qr23mf = "qr23mf.cli:app"`, create src/qr23mf package with empty cli.py entrypoint (typer app exposing --help only), add Taskfile.yml with `check`, `fmt`, `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, `test:coverage`, `build`, `clean` targets, add .gitignore, add placeholder .github/workflows/ci.yml running `task check` on ubuntu/macos/windows.
narratives.OutOfScope: Actual CLI behavior (covered by typer-cli scope); geometry and writers (separate scopes).

references.description: Greenfield spec interview — 3mf QR Code Generator
